primary_accounting_issue: Détermination de ce qu’est un actif financier dont les flux de trésorerie contractuels sont uniquement des paiements de principal et d’intérêts dans le cadre du test de classification IFRS 9

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the strict precedence rule by selecting the IFRS standard that directly governs financial asset classification and the meaning of contractual cash flows that are solely payments of principal and interest; no overlapping lower-precedence governing document remains in the candidate set.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: low — the question is directly about the IFRS 9 classification test and the context contains the governing paragraphs that define principal, interest and the SPPI assessment.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern the SPPI test and the resulting classification models for financial assets.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs clarify and illustrate how to assess time value of money, contingent features and examples of qualifying or non-qualifying cash flows.
These paragraphs provide the distinct alternative measurement outcome when the SPPI-based categories are not met or when the fair value option is used.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs relate to derecognition and continuing involvement rather than identifying the peer classification approaches for SPPI assets.
These agenda decisions concern equity instruments and separate financial statements, not the SPPI definition for debt-type financial assets.
These references are either servicing-related or narrow agenda material that is not needed to identify the top-level SPPI classification approaches.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets meeting the SPPI condition and held in a hold-to-collect business model
Financial assets meeting the SPPI condition and held in a business model achieved by collecting contractual cash flows and selling financial assets
Financial assets not measured in an SPPI-based category or designated to eliminate an accounting mismatch

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 uses this as a top-level measurement category for financial assets whose contractual cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest and that are held to collect those cash flows.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 uses this as a separate top-level measurement category for financial assets that meet the SPPI condition and are managed both to collect cash flows and to sell.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 uses this as the residual or elective top-level measurement category when a financial asset is not in an SPPI-based category or is designated at fair value.
